name: the-wedding
description: The Wedding - Production-grade full-stack platform with honeymoon contribution system

scripts.db:push: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && pnpm prisma db push'
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && pnpm prisma studio'
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate dev'
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && pnpm prisma db seed'
